# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated by the Monarchy Law Auto Replacer
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

namespace = coffee_with_milk
coffee_with_milk.8 = {
	type = country_event
	placement = root

	duration = 3

	dlc = dlc008

	title = coffee_with_milk.8.t
	desc = coffee_with_milk.8.d
	flavor = coffee_with_milk.8.f

	event_image = {
		video = "unspecific_politicians_arguing"
	}

	on_created_soundeffect = "event:/SFX/UI/Alerts/event_appear"
	#on_opened_soundeffect = "event:/SFX/Events/middleeast/middleclass_cafe"

	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/event_icons/event_scales.dds"

	cooldown = { days = normal_modifier_time }

	trigger = {
		# Triggered by JE
		NOT = {
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		}
		NOT = {
			has_variable = governors_policy_decision
		}
		country_has_voting_franchise = yes
	}

	immediate = {
		ig:ig_landowners ?= {
			save_scope_as = landowners_ig
		}
		ordered_scope_state = {
			limit = {
				is_capital = no
				has_building = building_coffee_plantation
				has_building = building_livestock_ranch
				is_incorporated = yes
			}
			order_by = gdp
			position = 0
			check_range_bounds = no
			save_scope_as = milk_state
		}
		ordered_scope_state = {
			limit = {
				is_capital = no
				has_building = building_coffee_plantation
				is_incorporated = yes
				NOT = {
					scope:milk_state = this
				}
			}
			order_by = gdp
			position = 0
			check_range_bounds = no
			save_scope_as = coffee_state
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = coffee_with_milk.8.a
		default_option = yes
		add_modifier = {
			name = modifier_governors_policy
			days = very_long_modifier_time
		}
		set_variable = governors_policy_decision
	}

	option = {
		name = coffee_with_milk.8.b
		set_variable = governors_policy_decision
		scope:milk_state = {
			add_radicals_in_state = {
				value = medium_radicals
				pop_type = aristocrats
			}
		}
		scope:coffee_state = {
			add_radicals_in_state = {
				value = medium_radicals
				pop_type = aristocrats
			}
		}
	}
}
